segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 24, Opener, The deadly nightshade (Amanita phalloides), one of the most poisonous mushrooms known, contains A-amanitin, which blocks eukaryotic messenger RNA synthesis because of its potent inhibition of RNA polymerase II.
